metadata.name: Arcbound Worker Modular — ETB counter, dies, transfers counter
metadata.description: p1 casts Arcbound Worker ({1}), which enters the battlefield with 1 +1/+1 counter from Modular 1, making it a 1/1. p2 then casts Lightning Bolt targeting it for 3 damage. The Worker's toughness is 1, so marking 3 damage is lethal and SBA destroys it. The Modular triggered ability goes on the stack: 'put its +1/+1 counters on target artifact creature.' p1 chooses Solemn Simulacrum as the target. The Modular trigger resolves, moving 1 counter from the Worker to the Simulacrum, making it a 3/3. This script tests CR 702.43a — Modular as both a static ETB counter ability and a triggered death ability.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.43a: Modular N means (1) 'This permanent enters with N +1/+1 counters on it' (static) and (2) 'When this permanent is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you may put a +1/+1 counter on target artifact creature for each +1/+1 counter on this permanent' (triggered). Arcbound Worker is 0/0 base, so with 1 counter it becomes 1/1. Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage — 3 >= 1 toughness, so SBA 704.5g destroys it. At death, Modular trigger checks counters on the Worker before it left the battlefield (per the 2006-09-25 ruling: counters counted before leaving). Solemn Simulacrum is a 2/2 artifact creature in the engine — it is the only Available artifact creature card suitable as a counter target. After receiving 1 counter it becomes a 3/3. Priority flow: after Arcbound Worker resolves and enters the battlefield, p1 (active player) gets priority (CR 116.3b). p1 must pass before p2 may cast Lightning Bolt. NOTE: Arcbound Worker is NOT in the engine Available Cards list and has no CardDefinition in crates/engine/src/cards/definitions.rs. The script will fail until the card definition is added and Modular keyword is implemented. Harness validation attempted 2026-02-28 — engine returned missing card (Arcbound Worker not in battlefield after cast) and NotPriorityHolder for p2 cast (fixed by adding priority_pass for p1 before p2 acts). Second retry: first fix applied (priority_pass added). Remaining failure is engine gap: Arcbound Worker definition missing.

disputes.description: Arcbound Worker has no CardDefinition in the engine (not in Available Cards list, not found in crates/engine/src/cards/definitions.rs). The script will fail with a missing-definition error until the card is authored and the Modular keyword (CR 702.43a) is implemented in the engine. Script is correct per CR rules; engine gap must be resolved separately before this script can be approved.

script.step_note: p1 casts Arcbound Worker; Modular 1 ETB places 1 +1/+1 counter on it

actions.description: Initial: Worker in p1 hand, Solemn Simulacrum on p1 battlefield as 2/2, Lightning Bolt in p2 hand
actions.note: Solemn Simulacrum (2/2 artifact creature) is present as the Modular counter target. Arcbound Worker awaits casting.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Arcbound Worker for {1} from the mana pool.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Arcbound Worker resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.43a: Modular 1 static ability — Arcbound Worker enters with 1 +1/+1 counter, making it a 1/1 (0/0 base + counter).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Arcbound Worker enters the battlefield. Modular 1 means it enters with 1 +1/+1 counter.

actions.description: After ETB: Arcbound Worker on p1 battlefield as 1/1 (0/0 base + 1 counter), stack empty
actions.note: Worker is now a 1/1 artifact creature on p1's battlefield (0/0 base + 1 +1/+1 counter from Modular). Solemn Simulacrum is still present at 2/2.

script.step_note: p2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting Arcbound Worker — lethal damage, Worker dies, Modular trigger fires

actions.note: CR 116.3: p1 (active player) passes priority after Arcbound Worker resolved. p2 may now act.
CR 601.2: p2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting Arcbound Worker (1/1 due to Modular counter).

actions.description: Lightning Bolt on the stack targeting the Worker

actions.note: CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Lightning Bolt resolves.

resolution.note: CR 120.3: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to Arcbound Worker. Worker has toughness 1 (0/0 base + 1 counter = 1/1); 3 >= 1 is lethal.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Lightning Bolt resolves, marking 3 damage on Arcbound Worker.

actions.description: SBA: Arcbound Worker has lethal damage marked, destroyed; Modular trigger placed on stack
actions.note: CR 704.5g: Arcbound Worker has damage marked (3) >= its toughness (1) — it is destroyed and goes to p1's graveyard. CR 702.43a: Modular 'when this permanent is put into a graveyard from the battlefield' trigger is placed on the stack.

actions.description: After SBA: Worker in p1 graveyard, Modular death trigger on stack
actions.note: CR 702.43a: Worker dying triggers Modular — 'put its +1/+1 counters on target artifact creature.' Trigger is on the stack. Solemn Simulacrum remains as the only artifact creature on the battlefield.
CR 702.43a: p1 chooses Solemn Simulacrum as the target artifact creature to receive the 1 counter from the Modular trigger.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Modular triggered ability resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.43a: Modular trigger resolves — 1 +1/+1 counter (all counters Worker had before leaving battlefield per 2006-09-25 ruling) moves to Solemn Simulacrum, making it a 3/3.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Modular triggered ability resolves. Solemn Simulacrum gains 1 +1/+1 counter (2/2 + 1 counter = 3/3).

actions.description: Final: Worker in p1 graveyard, Simulacrum still on battlefield with +1/+1 counter (3/3), stack empty, Lightning Bolt in p2 graveyard
actions.note: Modular successfully transferred 1 +1/+1 counter from the dying Arcbound Worker to Solemn Simulacrum. Simulacrum is now a 3/3 (2/2 base + 1 counter from Modular). Stack is empty.
